shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && printf '%s\\n' '--- files ---' && rg --files -g '"'!dst/target'"' -g '"'!**/.git/**'"' | sort && printf '%s\\n' '--- git status ---' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do curl -fsS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/' && break || sleep 1; done
printf '\\n--- named ---\\n'
curl -fsS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=%20%20Ada%20%20'
printf '\\n--- blank ---\\n'
curl -fsS 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=%20%20'"

/bin/bash -lc "ps -ef | grep '[j]ava -jar target/' || true
printf '%s\\n' '--- source files ---'
find src/main -type f -print | sort"
